intelligence.title: GEO is now a distinct discipline from SEO
intelligence.detail: AI traffic growing 165x faster than organic. 44.2% of citations from first 30% of content. Articles 2900+ words get 5.1 citations. FCP <0.4s gets 6.7 citations. 80% of LLM citations don't rank in Google top 100.

intelligence.title: Brands 6.5x more likely cited via third-party sources
intelligence.detail: G2, Capterra, Trustpilot profiles give 3x higher citation chance. We have zero profiles.

intelligence.title: Price monitoring SaaS gap in AU-focused affordable tier
PriceAPI.com closest competitor but no AU depth
Interactive tools and comparison pages outperform blog posts
Product Hunt B2B weak — multi-channel launch needed
Usage-based pricing now industry standard for dev tools/APIs

summary: GEO is separate from SEO — AI traffic growing 165x faster. Zero third-party profiles is biggest gap. AU ecommerce $43.6B growing 21.87% CAGR.
